Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise after record highs as earnings roll in

summary: S&P 500 +0.54%, Dow +0.37%, Nasdaq +0.69%, Russell 2000 +2.21%. S&P 500 hit fresh all-time intraday high. Apple earnings beat drove market higher. April was best monthly performance since 2020. Oil fell on Middle East peace hopes.
